basic_details.job_title: IIM Indore Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Indore has released the official notification for Consultant for Writing and Communication Studio posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Management, Social Sciences, Humanities or Sciences with inclination for working closely with faculty research and academic writing. Diverse academic and writing experience, certified expertise in communication and English-language proficiency, research comprehension ability preferred.
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in any discipline of Management, Social Sciences, Humanities or Sciences. Inclination for working closely with faculty research and academic writing for public facing scholarship. Candidates with diverse academic and writing experience and certified expertise in the field of communication and English-language proficiency, research comprehension ability will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Salary will be decided according to the candidate's credentials and interview performance. Salary will not be a constraint for the deserving candidate.

selection_process: Written test or/and an interview of the shortlisted candidates.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Indore Consultant for Writing and Communication Studio Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Indore Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in any discipline of Management, Social Sciences, Humanities or Sciences. Inclination for working closely with faculty research and academic writing for public facing scholarship. Candidates with diverse academic and writing experience and certified expertise in the field of communication and English-language proficiency, research comprehension ability will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Indore Consultant for Writing and Communication Studio Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Consultant position at IIM Indore?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Consultant for Writing and Communication Studio post at IIM Indore is 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A postgraduate degree in Management, Social Sciences, Humanities, or Sciences is required. Experience in academic writing and communication is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: You need to send your application in the prescribed format along with scanned copies of relevant documents via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test and/or an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The Consultant position is offered on a contract basis, meaning it is a fixed-term employment.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIM Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 453556.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 04/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Will salary be a constraint for deserving candidates?
faq.answer: The notification states that salary will not be a constraint for deserving candidates and will be decided based on credentials and interview performance.

faq.question: Q10. What is the primary role of the Consultant?
faq.answer: The Consultant will work closely with faculty research and academic writing for public-facing scholarship at the Writing and Communication Studio.
